extDescription.message: Chrome shortcuts: simulated split view and tab utilities.

cmd_detach_current_tab_desc.message: 🗂️ Detach current tab · Chrome: Not set · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+U

cmd_move_current_tab_left_desc.message: 🗂️ Move current tab left · Chrome: Ctrl+Shift+PgUp · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+Left

cmd_move_current_tab_right_desc.message: 🗂️ Move current tab right · Chrome: Ctrl+Shift+PgDn · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+Right

cmd_move_current_tab_first_desc.message: 🗂️ Move current tab to first · Chrome: Not set

cmd_move_current_tab_last_desc.message: 🗂️ Move current tab to last · Chrome: Not set

cmd_duplicate_current_tab_desc.message: 🗂️ Duplicate current tab · Chrome: Not set · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+D

cmd_unload_current_tab_desc.message: 🗂️ Unload tab from memory · Chrome: Not set

cmd_go_back_page_desc.message: 🧭 Go back to previous page · Chrome: Cmd+[ or Cmd+Left · 🎯 Suggestion: Alt+Left

cmd_go_forward_page_desc.message: 🧭 Go forward to next page · Chrome: Cmd+] or Cmd+Right · 🎯 Suggestion: Alt+Right

cmd_split_active_tab_simulated_desc.message: ↔️ Split active tab (simulated) · Chrome: Not set · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+Option+Click

cmd_native_split_view_desc.message: ↔️ Native Chrome Split View · Chrome: Cmd+Option+N

cmd_navigate_last_active_tab_desc.message: 🧭 Navigate to last active tab · Chrome: Not set

cmd_select_first_tab_desc.message: 🧭 Select first tab · Chrome: Not set

cmd_toggle_pin_tab_desc.message: 🗂️ Pin / unpin current tab · Chrome: Not set

cmd_toggle_mute_tab_desc.message: 🗂️ Mute / unmute current tab · Chrome: Not set

cmd_search_in_background_desc.message: 🧭 Search in background · Chrome: Not set

cmd_open_extension_shortcuts_desc.message: 🌐 Open Extension Shortcuts (chrome://extensions/shortcuts) · Chrome: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_flags_desc.message: 🌐 Open Chrome Flags (chrome://flags) · Chrome: Not set

cmd_open_chrome_help_desc.message: 🌐 Open Chrome Help (chrome://help) · Chrome: Not set

cmd_memo_jump_to_specific_tab_desc.message: 🧭 Jump to specific tab · Chrome: Cmd+1 to Cmd+8, Cmd+9

cmd_memo_toggle_bookmarks_bar_desc.message: 🌐 Show or hide Bookmarks Bar · Chrome: Cmd+Shift+B

cmd_memo_find_next_match_desc.message: 🧭 Find in page: next result · Chrome: Cmd+G

cmd_memo_find_previous_match_desc.message: 🧭 Find in page: previous result · Chrome: Cmd+Shift+G

cmd_memo_search_selected_text_desc.message: 🧭 Find in page: use selection (bar open) · Chrome: Cmd+E

cmd_memo_open_delete_browsing_data_desc.message: 🌐 Open Delete Browsing Data · Chrome: Cmd+Shift+Delete

cmd_memo_focus_main_menu_desc.message: 🌐 Focus main menu bar · Chrome: Control+F2

cmd_memo_cycle_focus_toolbars_desc.message: 🌐 Cycle focus through dialogs and toolbars · Chrome: Cmd+Option+Up or Down

cmd_memo_save_all_tabs_as_bookmarks_desc.message: 🌐 Save all tabs as bookmarks · Chrome: Cmd+Shift+D

cmd_toggle_autocopy_desc.message: 📋 Toggle automatic copy on selection · Chrome: Not set · 🎯 Suggestion: Cmd+Shift+C
